action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current internal state of the audit environment, including the active document ID, current progress, and existing risk logs.

action_set_definitions.name: list_contract_sections
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all section headers and clause indices for a specific contract document to allow for targeted reading.

document_id.description: The unique identifier of the contract document.

action_set_definitions.name: read_section_text
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full text of a specific section or clause within a contract for detailed analysis.

document_id.description: The unique identifier of the contract.

section_index.description: The index of the section/clause to read.

example_output.text: The Transferee shall assume all obligations under the contract...

action_set_definitions.name: log_novation_risk
action_set_definitions.description: Records a specific regulatory, financial, or compliance risk identified during the audit into the internal risk log.

risk_category.description: The category of the identified risk.

finding_details.description: Detailed description of the impediment and its potential impact on RCO approval.

suggested_mitigation.description: Proposed cost-recovery caps or actions to address the risk.

action_set_definitions.name: update_audit_progress
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the current progress percentage and environment status to reflect the audit's advancement.

new_status.description: The new mode of the environment.

state_description.active_document_id: The unique identifier of the contract currently being audited.
state_description.review_progress_percentage: Completion percentage of the document review based on clauses read.
state_description.internal_risk_log: Internal record of clauses identified as high-risk by the agent.
state_description.access_history: List of clause indices or section headers already visited by the agent.
state_description.environment_status: The current mode of the environment (e.g., 'browsing', 'extracting', 'finalizing').
